steps.title: E2E pre-deploy P1: last_event_ts populated within 11s
steps.output: After patching 12 DO→D1 writer sites in session-do.ts to use `this.name` (canonical client session id) instead of `this.ctx.id.toString()` (DO-hash): sent a new turn to sess-9187066b at t0=1776867491; first D1 poll at t+12s showed status='idle', last_event_ts=1776867502750 (epoch ms), num_turns=4, duration_ms=1475055. TTL flush, result sync, and status sync all now reach D1 correctly. Spec B2 primary success criterion met.

steps.title: Post-deploy prod VP (SIGKILL runner + D1 query)
steps.output: Manual step per spec lines 235–246; executed only after PR#52 merges and infra pipeline deploys.

fixes_applied.detail: Replaced `this.ctx.id.toString()` with `this.name` at 12 agent_sessions writer/reader sites (L1403, L1442, L1463, L1483, L1508, L1546, L1590, L1616, L1662, L1727, L1840, L3013). Since commit 2af282c (optimistic client_session_id flow) the D1 primary key is the client-supplied 'sess-<uuid>' string, which equals the Agent's `this.name` (DO room name) but NOT `this.ctx.id.toString()` (64-hex idFromName hash). Without this fix, `flushLastEventTsToD1` and 11 other DO-side agent_sessions writes were silent no-ops for every session created via the current UI. Verified by observing D1 row on existing session: status correctly flipped from 'running' to 'idle' on DO hydrate, and after sending a new turn, `last_event_ts` populated within 12s and `num_turns` / `duration_ms` updated via `syncResultToD1`. Typecheck clean; 980/980 orchestrator tests pass post-fix.

non_blocking_findings: use-now.tsx deviates from spec Gotchas (L391) on SSR/hydration safety — uses Date.now() as both createContext default and useState initializer instead of 0. Not blocking; SSR path for this route is limited.
Spec P1 task 5 naming rename not applied — session-do.ts:233 still reads LAST_EVENT_FLUSH_DEBOUNCE_MS; surrounding JSDoc still says 'debounce'. Cosmetic, behaviour unchanged.

Optimistic session-creation flow does not always write the D1 row via POST /api/sessions for brand-new sessions created through the UI — noticed sess-7b952147 ran fine in DO but never appeared in agent_sessions. Orthogonal to GH#50; flag for separate investigation.
recommendation: PR#52 is now safe to merge. The DO→D1 id mismatch bug that blocked spec B2's success criterion has been fixed by switching all DO-side agent_sessions writers/readers to the Agent base class's `this.name` property. All automated and E2E pre-deploy VP steps pass. Post-deploy prod VP (SIGKILL + D1 query) remains a manual step per spec.
